name: CMMC
niche: Help me to find a cybersecurity company that is poised to execute on the growth coming in CMMC (Cybersecurity Maturity Model Certification) but that is also not competitive with ControlCase (which I own). The company must be differentiated. There are many angles to take advantage of such as staffing and training companies for CCAs/CCPs or CMMC Level 1 Self Assessment technology tools etc etc (don't let these examples limit your logic).
